Operation 'getPerformList' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. The original summary and description are identical and lack specificity. 'Sample perform data' is vague terminology that doesn't clearly indicate what performance metrics are returned. The description provides no context about parameters, return structure, authentication requirements, or use cases. Enhanced version clarifies that this retrieves performance data samples, specifies the campaign ID requirement, explains the return value, mentions the Zapier integration context, and notes authentication requirements for better AI agent understanding.
